title: galach #1548
definition:
1) to poll, shave, shave off, be bald
    1a) (Piel)
        1a1) to shave
        1a2) to shave off
        1a3) (fig. of devastation)
    1b) (Pual) to be shaven
    1c) (Hithpael) to shave oneself
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to poll, shave, shave off, be bald
    1a) (Piel)
        1a1) to shave
        1a2) to shave off
        1a3) (fig. of devastation)
    1b) (Pual) to be shaven
    1c) (Hithpael) to shave oneself

    NASB:  to be bald, shave, shave off
